select_ai_personas_for_your: Yan Awọn eniyan AI fun ibaraẹnisọrọ Rẹ
choose_one_or_more_ai: Yan ọkan tabi diẹ sii eniyan AI lati ṣafikun ninu ibaraẹnisọrọ yii.
title: {akọle}
heading: {akọle}

button.isloading_starting_your_consultation: {ti n kojọpọ? 'Bibẹrẹ ijumọsọrọ rẹ...' : 'Bẹrẹ ijumọsọrọ rẹ'}

we_encountered_an_unexpected_error: A konge aṣiṣe airotẹlẹ. Eyi le jẹ igba diẹ.
terms_of_use_content_is: Awọn ofin lilo akoonu ko si ni ede rẹ.
your_virtualmd_selectedtopic_child: VirtualMD rẹ {selectedTopic === 'ọmọ' ? 'Paediatric': ti a yan Koko === 'orun'? 'Orun': 'Ounjẹ'} Egbe
virtualmd_provides_ai_powered_health: VirtualMD n pese alaye ilera ti o ni agbara AI ati awọn iṣẹ imọran. Awọn oludamọran AI wa kii ṣe awọn alamọdaju iṣoogun ti iwe-aṣẹ ati pe ko le rọpo itọju iṣoogun alamọdaju.
always_consult_with_qualified_healthcare: Nigbagbogbo kan si alagbawo pẹlu oṣiṣẹ ilera olupese fun egbogi okunfa ati itoju. Ni ọran pajawiri iṣoogun, pe awọn iṣẹ pajawiri lẹsẹkẹsẹ.
by_using_this_service_you: Nipa lilo iṣẹ yii, o jẹwọ pe VirtualMD jẹ ohun elo ẹkọ ati alaye nikan.
2024_virtualmd_all_rights_reserved: © 2024 VirtualMD. Gbogbo awọn ẹtọ wa ni ipamọ.
use_of_this_service_is: Lilo iṣẹ yii jẹ koko-ọrọ si Awọn ofin Iṣẹ wa ati Afihan Aṣiri. Alaye ilera rẹ ni aabo ati mu ni ibamu pẹlu awọn ofin ikọkọ to wulo.
virtualmd_is_a_registered_trademark: VirtualMD jẹ aami-iṣowo ti a forukọsilẹ. Lilo laigba aṣẹ jẹ eewọ.
